"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-290"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "## Summary

The `BalancerForward` proxy helper in GoFiber uses `Header.Add()` instead of `Header.Set()` when injecting the `X-Real-IP` header. This appends the real client IP as a second header value rather than replacing any attacker-supplied value. Upstream servers that read the first `X-Real-IP` header (nginx, Express, most HTTP servers) use the attacker's spoofed IP for logging, rate limiting, and access control.

## Vulnerable Code

**File:** `middleware/proxy/proxy.go`, lines 270-285

```go
func BalancerForward(servers []string, clients ...*fasthttp.Client) fiber.Handler {
    r := &roundrobin{
        current: 0,
        pool:    servers,
    }
    return func(c fiber.Ctx) error {
        server := r.get()
        if !strings.HasPrefix(server, "http") {
            server = "http://" + server
        }
        c.Request().Header.Add("X-Real-IP", c.IP())   // line 282: Add, not Set
        return Do(c, server+c.OriginalURL(), clients...)
    }
}
```

## Data Flow

1. Attacker sends request with `X-Real-IP: 10.0.0.1` (spoofed internal IP)
2. `BalancerForward` handler executes at line 282
3. `c.Request().Header.Add("X-Real-IP", c.IP())` APPENDS the real IP as a second header
4. Upstream server receives: `X-Real-IP: 10.0.0.1` AND `X-Real-IP: <real-attacker-ip>`
5. Most HTTP servers (nginx, Node.js, Apache) read the FIRST value
6. Upstream uses `10.0.0.1` for all IP-dependent logic

## Impact

- **Rate limit bypass:** IP-based rate limiting at the upstream uses the spoofed IP, allowing unlimited requests
- **IP ACL bypass:** Internal IP allowlists (e.g., admin panels restricted to `10.0.0.0/8`) can be bypassed
- **Audit log poisoning:** Security logs record the spoofed IP, making incident investigation unreliable
- **Geolocation bypass:** IP-based geofencing or region restrictions are circumvented

## Fix

Replace `Header.Add()` with `Header.Set()` at line 282:

```go
c.Request().Header.Set("X-Real-IP", c.IP())
```

`Header.Set()` replaces any existing header value, ensuring only the real client IP is forwarded.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gcfq-8gqf-4876", "html_url": "https://github.com/gofiber/fiber/security/advisories/GHSA-gcfq-8gqf-4876", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gcfq-8gqf-4876"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45045"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T07:57:49Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7063188?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ReneWerner87", "id": 7063188, "login": "ReneWerner87", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjcwNjMxODg=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ReneWerner87", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "X-Real-IP Spoofing via Header.Add() in BalancerForward", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T07:57:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gofiber/fiber/security-advisories/GHSA-gcfq-8gqf-4876", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gofiber/fiber/v3"}, "patched_versions": "3.3.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 3.2.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: X-Real-IP Spoofing via Header.Add() in BalancerForward
